# Codpet

> Animated pixel companion pets for Codex developer workspace, VS Code, and Cursor.

## Core Features
- Browse, preview, and download custom animated pixel companions.
- Light-weight, high-performance, and Retina-sharp WebP static assets.
- Fully compatible with Codex Editor and modern code workspaces.

## Key Resources
- [Index Catalog (JSON)](/index.json): Complete pet metadata registry containing names, slug values, and atlas configurations.
- [Pet Assets Directory](/pets/): Contains individual folders per pet with spritesheets and base WebP previews.
